basics.name: Yuchen Hou
basics.label: Master Student in Electrical Engineering
basics.summary: Master student at the National University of Singapore, focusing on Embodied AI and autonomous robotic decision-making.

work.name: Movel.AI
work.summary: Validated autonomous navigation and control systems for forklift robots in industrial environments.
highlights: Conducted on-site factory deployment and testing in real warehouse settings.
Integrated robotics software with fleet management systems.
Tech Stack: ROS2, Navigation Stack, Sensor Integration.
Core member of the NUS Advanced Control Lab, focusing on Embodied AI and autonomous robotic decision-making.
Research on perception and planning for aerial robots based on Vision-Language Navigation (VLN), and end-to-end Reinforcement Learning in complex 3D environments.

education.institution: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
highlights: Key Courses: Advanced Mathematics (96), Probability Theory (97), Random Signal Analysis (97), Microwave Technology and Antenna (97), Fundamentals of Communication (95), Complex Function (99).

awards.title: Second-class Scholarship
awards.awarder: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics
